features.name: Nimble Escape
features.text: The hexer can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.text: The hexer makes two Dagger attacks or two Sludge Bolt attacks. It can replace one attack with Spellcasting.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.text:
The hexer casts one of the following spells, requiring no material components, using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 12):

At will: mage hand, minor illusion

2/day each: thunderwave, shield

summary.description: Grimeback spellcasters who supplement the gang's muscle with sludge magic and hexes. Rarer than common goblins or thugs, hexers accompany patrols and serve as magical support. They hurl bolts of corrosive sludge and can cast thunderwave to scatter enemies in tight tunnels.

encounters.description: Occasionally found accompanying Grimeback patrols or stationed in the Dripfort. Gristla, Mogrot's daughter, uses this stat block.

groups.creatures: 1 Grimeback hexer with 4 Grimeback thugs on patrol
